stars.highlights: lib0xc is a C programming library from Microsoft that aims to provide safer C programming practices, reducing common vulnerabilities. It offers tools and abstractions to write more secure C code without sacrificing performance.
stars.worthReading: For AI engineers working on low-level systems or embedded AI, this library offers practical safety improvements for C, which is still widely used in performance-critical AI infrastructure.
stars.scoreReason: Freshness is moderate (269 stars, new but not viral), relevance is low (C library not directly AI), concreteness is high (real library with code).
